/usr/bin/c++ -g -O0 -Wall -Wextra -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/app/AppConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/app/Router.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/controllers/IpPoolController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/controllers/ReserveIpController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/controllers/AssignIpController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/controllers/TerminateIpController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/controllers/ServiceIdChangeController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/controllers/ServiceIdQueryController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/services/IpPoolService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/services/ReserveIpService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/services/AssignIpService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/services/TerminateIpService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/services/ServiceIdChangeService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/services/ServiceIdQueryService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/services/ReservationExpiryJob.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/repository/IpRepository.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/utils/IpUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ip_inventory.dir/src/utils/JsonValidator.cpp.o -o ip_inventory  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/libdrogon.so.1.9.12 /usr/local/lib/libtrantor.so.1.5.26 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so
